task_completion.description: Open the Sales Stage window in the CRM module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere web interface is open and the active tab or window title clearly displays 'Sales Stage'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new Sales Stage record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A blank or new record form is visible in the Sales Stage window, typically indicated by empty input fields or a highlighted 'New Record' toolbar icon.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Verbal' into the Search Key field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Verbal' is visible inside the 'Search Key' input field.

task_completion.description: Enter 'Verbal Commitment' into the Name field
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Verbal Commitment' is visible inside the 'Name' input field.
The numeric value '80' is visible inside the 'Probability' input field.
The text 'Customer has verbally agreed but contract not signed' (or at least the fragment 'verbally agreed') is visible inside the 'Description' input field.

task_completion.description: Ensure the record is marked as Active and save the new Sales Stage
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Active' checkbox is checked, and there is visual indication that the record has been saved (e.g., the save icon is greyed out, a 'Saved' status message appears, or the new record is visible in the grid view).

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the iDempiere web interface rather than using backend database scripts
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the iDempiere web GUI in a browser, not a terminal window executing SQL commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent is using the actual iDempiere application
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches standard iDempiere 12 elements (menus, toolbars, tabs), not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent entered the values into their respective fields rather than pasting the entire task description into a single field
integrity.visual_evidence: The values ('Verbal', 'Verbal Commitment', 80, description) are distinctly separated into their correct, respective input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with iDempiere 12 (GardenWorld demo). The target window is 'Sales Stage' (Window ID-53154) in the CRM module. The expected fields to be filled are: Search Key ('Verbal'), Name ('Verbal Commitment'), Probability (numeric Amount field, value 80), Description (containing 'verbally agreed'), and IsActive (must be checked/true).
